description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection belt, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Style Note This season's French Connection line features clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift   to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Beige clutch bag with an oyster shaped handle (can be folded over to be carried as a clutch) Has a fabric inner with magnetic closure Has a zipped pocket inside Material and Care Wood, fabric Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 25 cm (folded) Width: 31 cm
